column2: Create new sheets according to the current selection. The selection must consist of exactly one column with the sheet names to be created.
Create a new empty presentation based on the slide master.
Create a new gallery with a definable name.
Adds the format of the selected shape anew to the gallery.
Normalizes the width of all columns without changing the table size.
Normalizes the width or height of the cells.
Normalizes the height of all rows without changing the table size.
Normalize the width of the selected shapes to match the width of the reference shape (i.e. the last or first selected shape).
Normalize the width of the selected shapes to match the width of the widest shape.
Normalize the width of the selected shapes to match the width of the widest shape.\nWith the Shift key held, to the narrowest shape.\nWith the Ctrl key held, to the last selected shape.
Normalize the width of the selected shapes to match the width of the narrowest shape.
Normalize the width of the selected shapes to match the median of the widths of the shapes.
Normalize the width of the selected shapes to match the average of the widths of the shapes.
Normalize the height of the selected shapes to match the height of the reference shape (i.e. the last or first selected shape).
Normalize the height of the selected shapes to match the height of the tallest shape.
Normalize the height of the selected shapes to match the height of the tallest shape.\nWith the Shift key held, to the shortest shape.\nWith the Ctrl key held, to the last selected shape.
Normalize the height of the selected shapes to match the height of the shortest shape.
Normalize the height of the selected shapes to match the median of the heights of the shapes.
Normalize the height of the selected shapes to match the average of the heights of the shapes.
Place numbering shapes at the top left of the associated shape
Place numbering shapes at the top right of the associated shape
Match top side for all linked shapes
Refresh the interface and reload all values (so-called Invalidate)
Rotate objects in the circular arrangement according to their position in the circle
Options for calculating the horizontal distance between shapes
Options for calculating the vertical distance between shapes
Open the folder of the current presentation in Explorer.
Select a folder with image files to insert.
Adjust the fill level of a Harvey ball according to the selection.\n\nA Harvey ball shape is a group of a circle and a pie shape.
Adjust the color of a Harvey ball according to the selection.\n\nA Harvey ball shape is a group of a circle and a pie shape.
Adjust the background color of a Harvey ball according to the selection.\n\nA Harvey ball shape is a group of a circle and a pie shape.
Adjust the background color for the selector that highlights the active agenda item.
Adjust the line color of a Harvey ball according to the selection.\n\nA Harvey ball shape is a group of a circle and a pie shape.
Adjust the line color for the selector that highlights the active agenda item.
Adjust the text color for the selector that highlights the active agenda item.
Adjusts the background color of all shapes in the toggle shape. The background color is the color of the first found shape.
Adjusts the height of the selector relative to the font size.
Adjusts the line color of all shapes in the toggle shape that match the first found line color.
Adjusts the shape rotation to the distance vector or the angle.
Adjusts the foreground color of all shapes in the toggle shape. The foreground color is any color other than the background color.
Fits the selected shapes as a table into the dimensions of the content area. The content area can be defined beforehand, otherwise the slide's default content area is used.
Hide 0 values via cell format ('0;;;@'). The existing cell format is overwritten.
Hide and show 0 values via cell format. An attempt is made to detect the existing cell format and adjust it accordingly.
Display million amounts as x.x million via cell format. The existing cell format is overwritten.
Display thousand amounts as x.x k via cell format. The existing cell format is overwritten.
Reverse the arrow direction of the connector
Set the position and rotation of all linked shapes to the position of the selected shape.
Position the selected shapes at a default position.
Show presentation with the version changes
Match right side for all linked shapes
Open or change the reference of the selected slide thumbnail
The reference for all linked shapes is the currently selected shape
Reference or anchor point for distance and angle
Set reference or anchor points for distance and angle for the first shape and the other shapes
Open the referenced file and select the thumbnail slide.
Convert relative shape handle values into absolute values, or show original values.
Aligns the selected shapes as a table with the median spacing of the shapes.
Aligns the selected shapes as a table with a standard spacing of 0.35 cm (10 pt)
Aligns the selected shapes as a table with calculated row and column spacing. With the SHIFT key, spacing is set to 0.
Aligns the selected shapes as a table without spacing.
